swarmStyles.name: style A
swarmStyles.text:
photorealistic image . The main subject is on the right side of the image.

image style: use grey colors only. very shallow depth of field. Smooth gradient from dark grey on the left to light grey on the right, Subtle red accents only on the right side
Low contrast, with the lightest color being light grey
Left side: Minimal detail, dark grey, simplified shapes or outlines.
Center: Gradual emergence of more defined shapes and details.
Right side: Majority of the detailed content, medium grey with muted red accents.
Transition: Smooth progression from left to right, from dark grey to light grey
Increasing level of detail and complexity from left to right.
